description:
## app [1.12.11](https://github.com/SilvaTechB/silva-manager/compare/v1.12.10...v1.12.11) (2026-03-29)


### Changes

* Switched patch source to MorpheApp/morphe-patches (Morphe repos)
* Morphe API (api.morphe.software) is the primary patch source
* morphe-patcher:1.3.2 for full Morphe patch compatibility
